headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -90.5)
key_insights: Fears trending up 85% over 7 days (strong momentum)
Alert: Overall sentiment has significantly decreased (z=-2.37)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 123 quotes and 104 at strong intensity - people are expressing very high levels of anger and dissatisfaction today.

• This represents a massive spike from yesterday's near-zero frustration level, though still well below the 56-day peak.

• Optimism dropped significantly into negative territory while fears improved substantially from yesterday's much lower point.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
